# Dunbrack 2010 Rotamer Library Notice

ProtRepair redistributes `vendor/faspr/dun2010bbdep.bin` as bundled data used
by the vendored FASPR executable.

- Data source: Dunbrack Lab Smooth Backbone-Dependent Rotamer Library 2010
- Source page: <https://dunbrack.fccc.edu/lab/bbdep2010>
- License stated by source page: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0
  International (CC BY 4.0), <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/>
- Attribution: Shapovalov, M.V. and Dunbrack, R.L., Jr. "A smoothed
  backbone-dependent rotamer library for proteins derived from adaptive kernel
  density estimates and regressions." Structure 19, 844-858 (2011).

The source page states that the library is free, redistributable, and
modifiable for academia and industry as long as the source of the library is
acknowledged.
